title: Industrial Logistics
description: This pack adds a real incentive for building and making a vast train network! With mods like Modern Industrialization locked behind building a well-put together logistics network using Create trains and everything else it offers
body:
# Industrial Logistics

My attempt at integrating Create and Modern Industrialization (MI) with logistical challenges.

> All of MI's ores are found exclusively within "nodes" accessible via drills. _Satisfactory-style_.
>
> Trains are essential. Unless you want thousands of belts everywhere! And remember, trains can travel through the Nether for shorter routes. :)
---

### FAQ

**Why is [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) disabled by default?**

> It's disabled to potentially improve performance. Players who wish to use it can enable it and benefit from the new [multiplayer features](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons/version/2.3.0-b-1.16.5) added in Distant Horizons.

**Why are Modern Industrialization (MI) item pipes disabled?**

> They are very useful, but I wanted players to utilize Create's new system. I'm still evaluating its performance(tps and usability), but completing MI this way might be achievable. 🤷
>
> MI's fluid pipes remain enabled because I prefer them over Create's pipes. Additionally, completing the oil age with Create's pipes would be extremely difficult.

**Modern Industrialization (MI) seems very unchanged from how it usually is.**

> I'm still actively modifying it. I adjust recipes as needed during my own survival playthrough. Therefore, changes may be implemented gradually.

**Are there quests?**

> Unfortunately, there aren't many suitable quest mods available for this version on Modrinth. :( However, the MI in-game guide explains most of the progression. Sorry!

**I can't find andesite! What can I do?**

> Due to the world gen mod thats in the pack andesite is kind of rare, best way to get it is to find a create vein that has diorite or get a bunch of quartz until you make andesite some other way.
